audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Validation at L131-133 checks row_indices.len() == cell_indices.len() == cells.len() == proofs_bytes.len(). Since row_indices has length equal to original commitments (by deduplicate_with_indices construction), this enforces len(commitments) == len(cell_indices) == len(cells) == len(proofs). Validation runs on all code paths before cryptographic operations.
